d: Hewynn heals all allies for [[95%]]<ATK> HP per second for [[9]]s.
Increases healing amount per second to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing amount per second to [[105%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing amount per second to [[110%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing amount per second to [[115%]]<ATK>.
Hewynn heals [[1]] [[weakest]] ally for [[280%]]<ATK> of their HP.
Increases HP recovery to [[290%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Hewynn's skill grants this effect once every [[3]]s to [[1]] [[weakest]] ally while casting her Ultimate.
Hewynn heals an ally, granting an extra [[120%]]<ATK> HP if their HP ratio is below [[50%]]. This effect can trigger once every [[8]]s per ally.
Heals an ally and removes all their dispellable debuffs, triggering once every [[6]]s per ally.
Heals once every [[6]]s per ally, and removes dispellable debuffs once every [[4]]s per ally.
Increases the extra healing amount to [[130%]]<ATK>.
Hewynn increases her ATK by [[9%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[6%]] ATK after casting Rain Prayer for the first time.
Hewynn increases her ATK by [[12%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[8%]] ATK after casting Rain Prayer for the first time.
Hewynn increases her ATK by [[14%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[10%]] ATK after casting Rain Prayer for the first time.
Hewynn is [[unaffected]] for [[6]]s while casting Rain Prayer. During this time, all allies take [[30%]] less damage.
Hewynn has [[300]] Initial Energy. While Rain Prayer is effective, all allies take [[32%]] less damage.
While Rain Prayer is effective, all allies take less [[34%]] damage and receive buffs from Revitalize.
While Rain Prayer is effective, all allies take [[36%]] less damage.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: Hewynn also grants the healed ally [[30]] Haste for [[6]]s when Revitalize is in effect.
